title: stelis pusilla
intro: Stelis pusilla, also known as the Small Stelis or Pusilla Orchid, is a species of epiphytic orchid native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Stelis pusilla include its ability to alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, and its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions due to its medicinal properties.
